name: /doctor --explain treats numeric severity 0 as equivalent to the string off in the resolved severity output
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules:\n  no-eval: 0\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain no-eval --profile profiles/p.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'effective_severity=off' out.txt && grep -q 'source_value=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
